name: Neewer X17 17inch Professional Teleprompter
description: The black Neewer X17 Remote Teleprompter is ideal for video recording, news broadcasting, and online streaming and sets up on a tripod via its 1/4"-20 or 3/8"-16 holes. Viewing distance is 13' backed by 71% light transmission from its clear beamsplitter glass.

features.Specifications: Model: X17 II | Beamsplitter Size: 17" | Light Transmittance: 71% | Load Capacity: 44lb/20kg | Compatibility: Tablets & phones ≤ 9.3"/235mm wide | Package Dimensions: 16.9"x16.5"x5.5"/43x42x14cm | Net Weight: 7.1lb/3.2kg
features.What’s in the box?: 1 x X17 II Teleprompter | 1 x RT111 Remote | 1 x Carrying Case
